description_long: A group of six donuts is arranged in two neat rows on a flat, neutral-colored surface. The donuts display a variety of glazes and colors, including chocolate brown, light pink, white, and a distinctive blue. Each donut has a classic toroidal shape with a visible central hole, and the glazes appear smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a fresh, appetizing texture. The donuts are unadorned by toppings, with their surfaces appearing clean and uniform. The arrangement and color diversity evoke a bakery or café display, suitable for urban environments such as street vendors, park benches, or outdoor markets. No packaging or branding is visible, and the donuts are presented directly on the surface.
description: Six colorful, glazed donuts are neatly arranged on a flat surface, each with a smooth, glossy finish and no visible toppings or packaging.
description_view_0: Front view shows all six donuts in two rows, highlighting their varied glazes and central holes.
description_view_1: Angled view reveals the side profiles and the arrangement of the donuts, emphasizing their thickness and color differences.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the donuts from behind, with the blue and white glazed donuts most prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view shows the donuts' arrangement and the smooth, unadorned surfaces of each.
attribute_icing_type: chocolate glaze, pink glaze, white glaze, blue glaze; all smooth and glossy with no visible texture variation
